description.first: Pratama Solusi Teknologi merupakan perusahaan perseroan terbatas yang bergerak di bidang teknologi informasi, multimedia, advertising, dan event organizer.
description.second: Berdiri tanggal 06 Februari 2021 dengan Nomor Induk Berusaha 1251000201769 dan Nomor SK Pendirian AHU-0010780.AH.01.01 Tahun 2023 dengan NPWP 41.444.400.0-409.000 beralamat di Kp. Gandasoli, Desa Babakan Kecamatan Wanayasa, Kabupaten Purwakarta, Provinsi Jawa Barat.

description.first: Pratama Solusi Teknologi is a limited liability company engaged in information technology, multimedia, advertising, and event organizing.
description.second: Established on February 6, 2021, with Business Identification Number 1251000201769 and Deed of Establishment Number AHU-0010780.AH.01.01 of 2023, registered with Taxpayer ID 41.444.400.0-409.000. Located in Kp. Gandasoli, Babakan Village, Wanayasa District, Purwakarta Regency, West Java Province.
